channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Apple feels gravity as the Trump tariff hammer falls
item.description: Apple’s leadership is no doubt scrambling to identify a silver lining (if there is one) as the storm of US President Donald J. Trump’s punishing range of global tariffs rains heavily across the company’s supply chain.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple patents motion-predicting technology that can count reps and identify exercises during a workout
item.description: A new Apple patent reveals technology that can identify exercises and count reps during workouts using a camera.
item.dc:creator: stephen.warwick@futurenet.com (Stephen Warwick), TechRadar

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 exclusives - release schedule for confirmed games including The Duskbloods and Mario Kart World
item.description: Here's all of the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 exclusives that have officially been confirmed for release. This includes release dates for Super Mario World and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Opinion: The tech fantasy that powers AI is running on fumes
item.description: We were promised life-changing transformations. Instead we get a mid-level technology that helps us write emails.
item.dc:creator: Tressie McMillan Cottom, The Mercury News

item.title: The future of AI search is Google’s to lose
item.description: When Google unveiled a new neural network design in 2017 called the Transformer architecture, it probably had no idea this would threaten Google Search’s dominance within seven years. When OpenAI applied Google’s Transformer architecture to generative language models, the GPT was born.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: La restauración del patrimonio cultural se rinde a la innovación tecnológica
item.description: La compañía gallega Sixtema lleva a término el proyecto RESTAUR.AR, una iniciativa de I+D orientada a desarrollar nuevas herramientas digitales para la conservación, restauración y divulgación del patrimonio cultural.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI watchdog accused OpenAI of using copyrighted books without permission
item.description: An artificial intelligence watchdog is accusing OpenAI of training its default ChatGPT model on copyrighted book content without permission.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Potential Nvidia chip shortage looms as Chinese customers rush to beat US sales ban
item.description: The AI chip shortage could become even more dire as Chinese customers are purportedly looking to hoard Nvidia chips ahead of a proposed US sales ban.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta is fined by Turkey after refusing to restrict content on Facebook and Instagram
item.description: Meta said it has been hit with a hefty fine for resisting Turkish government demands to limit content on Facebook and Instagram.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: IBM Cloud speeds AI workloads with Intel Gaudi 3 accelerators
item.description: IBM Cloud is broadening its AI technology services with Intel Gaudi 3 AI accelerators now available to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Plug and Play AI startup incubator launches downtown San Jose tech hub
item.description: A new artificial intelligence center of excellence has officially launched in downtown San Jose and picked its first location.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Senate Democrats open investigation into reports AI could replace contract workers at Education Department
item.description: Senate Democrats are opening an investigation into reports that Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) is attempting to replace some contract workers at the Education Department with artificial intelligence (AI). Democratic Sens. Elizabeth Warren (Mass.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: SolarWinds launches incident response tool, boosts AI in observability platform
item.description: SolarWinds this week introduced a new incident response product and announced AI-based updates to its observability platform and service management product that are aimed at strengthening IT operational resilience.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Google adds end-to-end email encryption to Gmail
item.description: Google has introduced a new end-to-end encryption (E2EE) feature in Gmail, enabling organizations to send encrypted emails that even Google cannot read to other Gmail users.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Tesla sales plunge to lowest level since 2022 amid Trump backlash
item.description: Tesla sales dropped by nearly 13 percent in the first three months of the year amid a broader backlash against CEO Elon Musk and his leadership of President Trump's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Gmail planning end-to-end encrypted emails
item.description: Google announced Tuesday that Gmail users soon will be able to send and receive encrypted emails without a third-party provider. The new process will allow Gmail users to send end-to-end encrypted messages to "any user on any email inbox with just a few clicks," Google wrote in a blog post.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: 3 key features in Kong AI Gateway 3.10
item.description: Kong AI Gateway 3.10 introduces new capabilities designed to help organizations govern their generative AI usage more effectively, reduce hallucinations from large language models (LLMs), and boost developer productivity. We achieve this while keeping sensitive data protected and safe.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: HTMX and Alpine.js: How to combine two great, lean front ends
item.description: HTMX and Alpine are two low-overhead ways to empower your front end. Neither requires a build step, and both let you add Ajax-style API calls and client-side UI updates with minimal fuss.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 launches in June with new Mario Kart World game
item.description: Nintendo has announced a June 5 launch date and $449.99 price tag for its latest gaming console, the Switch 2, which will introduce interactive chat and screenshare functions to connect gamers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Kryska, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: New Python lock file format will specify dependencies
item.description: Python’s builders have accepted a proposal to create a universal lock file format for Python projects that would specify dependencies, enabling installation reproducibility in a Python environment.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Migrating VISTA Data Completed, Electronic Health Record Modernization Underway
item.description: The Department of Veterans Affairs has completed the migration of all data from its original records system, VISTA, into its new electronic health record (EHR). This marks a significant milestone in modernizing healthcare delivery for veterans.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Tech startup, major airline partner to launch electric air taxi service
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson discusses Joby Aviation and Virgin Atlantic planning to launch 200-mph U.K. air taxis linking airports and cities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man accused of coercing 9-year-old into sharing explicit images after chatting on TikTok and Roblox
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A U.S. airman has been charged with coercing a 9-year-old girl to share sexually explicit images of herself after he posed as a 13-year-old and chatted with the child on TikTok and the gaming site Roblox.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, ABC 4
